query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "multi-turn reflective masking elicits reasoning in mask diffusion mode" linguistics
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it investigates the same core mechanism of "multi-turn" reasoning and "reflective" feedback loops (via tool integration and preference learning) to elicit improved reasoning capabilities in LLMs, which is the central domain of the user's question regarding "Multi-Turn Reflective Masking."
